## Checklist

- [ ] Read related task/ADR
- [ ] Kept changes minimal
- [ ] Added/updated tests or explained why not
- [ ] Ran lint (if configured)
- [ ] Ran tests
- [ ] Ran typecheck (if configured/applicable)
- [ ] Updated docs if needed
